calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-30-2002 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Mary J. Hinds; Bailiff: L. Pierotti. Plaintiff appears by Robert Legallet, with counsel, David J. Foran; no apperance by defendant. Robert Legallet and Eva Krucker sworn and examined. Plaintiff's Exhibit #1, 7/19/02 letter, and Exhibit #2, 30-day notice are admitted in evidence and returned to plaintiff's counsel at the end of the hearing. Plaintiff's counsel presents a prove-up and the court orders judgment for plaintiff, including posession of the premises, forthwith, termination of the oral rental agreement, daily damages of $36.46, totalling $1,531.32 and $201.50 costs. Judgment signed.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-25-2002 Continued To Sep-30-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept.218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Joseph A, Sacramento, Esq, appeared for the plaintiff. There was no appearance by the defendant and the court took the matter off the settlement calendar. The request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
